Package org.mitre.synthea.engine

Class PhysiologySimulator.SimConfig

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.PhysiologySimulator.SimConfig
Enclosing class:
PhysiologySimulator
public static class PhysiologySimulator.SimConfig extends Object
POJO configuration for the simulation.
